abilities.description: When you focus on a source of light and capture its essence, roll +wits. On a strong hit, set your light track to +6. On a weak hit, make it +3. Then, when you make a move to overcome or navigate darkness, you may add +2 and suffer -1 light.

You may use your light to @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.ae5994ceb3cba098]{Strike} or @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.723192c97fec4fe2]{Clash} against a dark-dwelling foe. Choose the amount of light to unleash, and roll +light (instead of +iron or +edge). Suffer -light equal to that amount. On a hit, your progress is 1+your unleashed light.
When you perform this ritual, add +1 and take +1 momentum on a hit.
